description: Documentation site for NepDate Widget, a free Nepali Calendar App, Nepali date converter and Bikram Sambat calendar application for Windows. Resources include full API reference for the NepDate .NET library, integration guide, and calendar reference pages for BS 2082-2084.

resources.name: Homepage
resources.description: App overview, feature highlights, download links

resources.name: API Reference
resources.description: Full NepDate .NET library API reference with constructors, properties, and usage examples

resources.name: Integration Guide
resources.description: How to integrate the NepDate library into .NET projects

resources.name: FAQ
resources.description: Frequently asked questions about the app and library

resources.name: Bikram Sambat Calendar System
resources.description: Explanation of the Nepali Bikram Sambat (BS) calendar system

resources.name: Screenshot Gallery
resources.description: 30+ screenshots of every tab, tool, and theme in NepDate Widget

resources.name: Agent Skill Document
resources.description: Structured skill document for AI agent navigation of this site
